content.en:
If Ye Tian broke through to the Mythical Dao Realm, the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable would not dare to trouble Ye Tian, and would definitely be killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

But now, he is not afraid of Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!!

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable kept attacking Ye Tian, and Ye Tian was completely suppressed.

However, his defensive ability was too strong, and he stubbornly blocked the attack of the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable, even if he was injured, he could still hold on for a while.

But after a long time, he will definitely not be able to stop it.

Really.

After a long time of fighting, Ye Tian's replica body still couldn't bear it, and he was killed by the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable, but at this moment, Su Ho didn't know where to run, and the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable naturally couldn't find Su Ho.

......

"Ye Tian, are you okay?"

Soho summoned him.

Ye Tian replied: "It's nothing to lose a clone!"

"Thank you, if you hadn't saved me, I wouldn't have lost a clone!" Soho said apologetically.

"Ye Tian, I found the lair of a supreme mythical-level creature somewhere in the Ancient Abyss Realm, and the strength of that mythical-level creature is no less than mine, I can't kill it. You have a lot of doppelgangers, and you may want to kill them. "Soho Road.

"Oh, where?"

Ye Tian is still very interested in the mythical blood of mythical creatures.

With one more piece of the blood of the Supreme Legend, he can have one more Body of the Supreme Legend, and the effect will even be better, and he will be able to complete the transformation of the Body of the Supreme Legend more easily in the future.

If such a good thing is easy to get, he will naturally be happy.

Soho immediately informed the exact location.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian passed.

......

Somewhere in the Ancient Abyss Realm.

It's a mountain range, and deep inside it's a lair that houses a powerful mythical creature.

Airplanes!

A figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"Sure enough, it's a supreme mythical creature - the Taihe Golden Crowbird!"

Ye Tian quickly condensed the two replica bodies, and then began to besiege this Taihe Golden Crow Bird.

Thundered!!!!

The fierce battle began.

The strength of this Taihe Golden Crow Bird is very strong, no less than Soho, and it is also about the same as Ye Tian's strength.

Ye Tian's attack is not necessarily as strong as Soho, he is just far superior in defense to Soho.

Therefore, in the face of the Taihe Golden Crow Bird, under the siege of Ye Tian's three replica bodies, this Taihe Golden Crow Bird can hold on for a long time.

But under the long-term siege, the Taihe Golden Crow Bird finally couldn't bear it.

Rumble!!!

The Taihe Golden Crow Bird was bombarded and killed, and its body fell into the nest and was collected by Ye Tian.

Immediately.

Ye Tian began to scrape the nest of the Taihe Golden Crow Bird to see if there were any good things.

As a result, he also really found good things.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian saw a piece of crimson metal, which exuded a terrifying aura of supreme rules.

"This is the first Sequence of Solstice Rule items????"

Ye Tian was excited.

He had been looking for the first Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, but he couldn't find them, and he couldn't trade them.

Unexpectedly, I found it this time.

He immediately left the two replica bodies here, and then refined this piece of the first Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item.

This first-order supreme rule item was swallowed by him and began to be refined.

Airplanes!

The origin of the first sequence of Dao rules is presented.

But then, a terrifying flame burned Ye Tian's body.

Even with a variety of Perfection and Legendary Bodies, he still couldn't bear this flame, and his body was gradually crumbling.

Ye Tian didn't care, and continued to comprehend the first sequence of supreme dao rules, and it didn't take long for his body to be incinerated into ashes, and the first sequence supreme dao rule item metal fell to the ground again.

"This is definitely a low-quality first-order supreme rule item!"

Ye Tian was sure.

The side effects were too great, no wonder the Taihe Golden Crow Bird didn't dare to refine this first-order Dao rule item, and it also sensed the danger of death and didn't dare to refine it, so it stayed inside the nest.

Ye Tian didn't care about such side effects, he continued to condense a copy body, and once again comprehended the first sequence of Dao rules.

Soon, one of his replicas burned to ashes.

Then, he continued to refine and continue to attain enlightenment.

The years passed.

Ye Tian came to his senses again and again, and he was getting closer and closer to comprehending the rules of the first sequence of the Dao.

Once he comprehended the rules of the First Sequence of the Dao Dao, his strength would transform to a level comparable to that of the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable.

And at the same time.

The battles in the Ancient Abyss Realm were extremely frequent, and the Patriarch and the Demon Venerable had their own losses, and the losses of the top Legend to the Dao Realm and the top Demon Lord level were even greater, and many of them fell and died.

this day.

Airplanes!!!!!

Ye Tian's body was permeated with the power of the first sequence of supreme rules.

"It's done, I successfully comprehended the rules of the first sequence of supreme paths, and my strength has skyrocketed!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, he continued to comprehend this first-order supreme rule item, after all, he hadn't exhausted its origin!

......

"A Demon Lord!"

Ye Tian met a demon lord and shuttled directly to it.

When the demon lord saw Ye Tian, he wanted to escape, after all, he recognized Ye Tian.

However.

The first sequence of the rules of the Dao turned into silk threads and pierced the opponent's body.

In an instant, the other party's body collapsed.

And before he died, he showed an incredible look.

The first sequence of supreme rules, even the top Demon Venerable, probably didn't comprehend it, but Ye Tian comprehended it, this is simply incredible.

"The top demon lord is too weak, it is estimated that even ordinary elders, when they meet me, they will be killed by me in seconds!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But the patriarch or demon venerable who entered here is not too weak, like the Blood Lake Demon Venerable, it is already the countdown.

Before you know it, another period of time has passed.

At this time, there were fewer Demon Venerables and Patriarchs who were still alive, and most of them were healing.

And during this period of time, Ye Tian has gained a lot.

He is one person compared to six people, hunting everywhere, finding a lot of resources and mythical blood.

However, the Innate Primordial Treasure is still very rare, and he is not very lucky, so he has not found one so far.

And the Demon Lord and Demon Venerable he killed did not have an innate primordial treasure on their bodies.

But on this day, his luck came!

He encounters a mythical creature with an innate primordial treasure.

【Winged Blood Ant】

The reason why Ye Tian could tell at a glance that the other party had an innate primordial treasure was because the other party's eyes were abnormal, exuding a strange light, and his aura was like the breath of an innate primordial treasure.

In the course of the battle, the Divine Winged Blood Ant seems to be able to perfectly perceive his methods, find his loopholes, and make counterattacks.

This must be one of the abilities of the Innate Primordial Treasure!
